title: <div><tt>  •  Your aesthetic uses both, but </tt><b><tt>motion is ever-present</
content:
• Your aesthetic uses both, but motion is ever-present, transitions are structural.

⸻

💡 5. MOTION IS STRUCTURALLY TIED TO NAMING

You mentioned:
• Any clip/sequence with keyframed motion or masks should reflect this in its modifiers within the naming scheme.
• E.g., _float, _drift, _mask, _keyed, etc.

⸻

📦 6. MOTION VARIES BY PANEL IDENTITY

You’ve already observed:
• Different sources like cloudedsun_ORIG.mov or skybeam_cloudedsun behave differently based on crop, opacity, and blend.
• So motion might respond to source identity, layer role (foreground, reflection, background), and V1/V2 variant.

⸻
